message:
Add process-transcript.ts script for transcript processing

- Converts raw JSONL to ProcessedTranscript JSON format
- Calculates stats (messages, tokens, duration)
- Supports annotations merging
- Can read from stdin or file
- Completes the transcript processing pipeline

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-7mo (transcript processing scripts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-0d1","title":"Implement end-to-end test suite (e2e/)","description":"**Details:**
- Full user flow tests using Playwright
- Test critical paths: search → view → copy → install
- Test cross-browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- Test mobile viewports
- Test offline mode (PWA)

**Critical E2E Flows:**
1. **Search & Copy Flow:**
   - Load homepage
   - Type in search bar
   - Click prompt card
   - Click copy button
   - Verify clipboard content

2. **Basket & Export Flow:**
   - Add multiple prompts to basket
   - Open basket sidebar
   - Export as ZIP
   - Verify ZIP contents

3. **SpotlightSearch Flow:**
   - Press Cmd+K
   - Type query
   - Navigate with arrow keys
   - Press Enter to copy

4. **Skill Install Flow:**
   - Click install button
   - Verify command copied to clipboard

5. **Mobile Flows:**
   - Test touch interactions
   - Bottom sheet prompt detail
   - Swipe gestures

**Logging Requirements:**
- Detailed step-by-step logs
- Screenshot on failure
- Network request logging
- Console error capture

**Framework:** Playwright

**Test Organization:**
```
e2e/
  tests/
    search-copy.spec.ts
    basket-export.spec.ts
    spotlight.spec.ts
    mobile.spec.ts
    pwa-offline.spec.ts
  fixtures/
    ...
  playwright.config.ts
```

**Reasoning:** E2E tests validate entire user journeys work correctly. Critical for catching integration issues between frontend components.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:32.191748492-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:32.191748492-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-0d1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r9m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:08.628822653-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8s6","title":"Implement jfp render command with variable injection","description":"Part 6.7 of PLAN. 'jfp render <id> --VAR=value' fills {{VAR}} placeholders. --fill prompts for missing variables interactively. --context <file> appends file content under '---\nContext:\n'. --stdin reads context from stdin. Guardrails: default max context 200KB, truncation note with filename if clipped. 'file' variable type reads file contents (size-capped), 'path' type passes raw path string.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:46:31.685428973-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:28:44.106950636-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:28:44.106950636-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented --fill flag, file/path variable types, improved context handling with truncation notes","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8s6","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6gx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:15.95483587-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8s6","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:15.982490488-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
